# allinkl_mail_forward (Resource)

Manages a mail forward (redirect) at all-inkl.com (KAS). The source address must not collide with an existing mailbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "allinkl_mail_forward" "sales" {
  local_part = "sales"
  domain     = "example.com"
  targets    = ["alice@example.org", "bob@example.org"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain part of the source address. Changing it forces a new forward.
- `local_part` (String) Part of the source address before the `@`. Changing it forces a new forward.
- `targets` (List of String) Destination addresses (1-10).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The source address (`local_part@domain`).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import allinkl_mail_forward.sales sales@example.com
```
